SEARCH

Uses of Enum Class
io.kroxylicious.authorizer.service.Decision

Packages that use Decision
Package
Description
io.kroxylicious.authorizer.service
An abstract API for making access control decisions about Subjects wanting to perform Actions.

  • Uses of Decision in io.kroxylicious.authorizer.service

    Methods in io.kroxylicious.authorizer.service that return Decision
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Decision
    AuthorizeResult.decision(ResourceType<?> operation, String resourceName)
    Returns the decision about whether the given AuthorizeResult.subject() is allowed to perform the given operation on the resource with the given resourceName.
    static Decision
    Decision.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static Decision[]
    Decision.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    Methods in io.kroxylicious.authorizer.service that return types with arguments of type Decision
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> Map<Decision,List<T>>
    AuthorizeResult.partition(Collection<T> items, ResourceType<?> operation, Function<T,String> toName)
    Partitions the given items, whose names can be obtained via the given toName function, into two lists based on whether the AuthorizeResult.subject() is allowed to perform the given operation on them.
